Hero.subtitle: CSY Group runs a Discord trading community with daily market analysis, focused chat, and live trade sessions. Our edge is depth data — reading institutional flow and turning it into execution.

About.label: About CSY Group
About.paragraph1: CSY Group is a Discord-based trading education community. Our edge is depth data: reading how institutional money positions and where flow is heading, then translating that into practical execution.
About.paragraph2: We don't rely on random indicators. We focus on order-flow context, institutional positioning, and ATAS-style depth analysis to build high-conviction trade plans.

daily.title: Daily Analysis
daily.desc: Every day we break down market structure, identify key levels, and map out high-probability scenarios.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Real-time chat, Q&A, and trader-to-trader review in a focused Discord environment.

coaching.title: Live Coaching
coaching.desc: Tuesday to Thursday around 9PM with live decision process, real-time execution walkthrough.

flow.title: Flow Lens
flow.desc: Use ATAS-style depth data to read larger money movement and institutional positioning.

Features.label: What Members Get
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to develop an institutional-grade trading approach, from live coaching to depth data analysis.

daily.title: Daily Market Analysis
daily.desc: Daily market analysis and idea sharing in Discord. We break down structure, identify levels, and share actionable setups.

live.title: Live Trade Sessions
live.desc: Live trade sessions from Tuesday to Thursday around 9PM with live decision process and real-time execution.

coaching.title: Technical Coaching
coaching.desc: Technical coaching during and beyond live sessions. Personal feedback on your entries, risk management, and trade reviews.

flow.title: Institutional Flow View
flow.desc: Institutional flow view using ATAS-style depth data. See where the big money is positioning before making your move.

Approach.label: Our Trading Approach
Approach.subtitle: We do not rely on random indicators. CSY focuses on depth data, order-flow context, and institutional positioning to build high-conviction trade plans.

data.title: Data Read
data.desc: Track how liquidity and aggressive flow behave at key levels. Understand what the depth data is showing before any decision.

direction.title: Direction
direction.desc: Identify where larger capital is building pressure. Use institutional flow to determine the most probable market direction.

execution.title: Execution
execution.desc: Turn data into entries, risk controls, and management. Precise entry points with defined stop-loss and take-profit levels.

validation.title: Validation
validation.desc: Practice the same logic in live sessions and daily review. Refine your process through repetition and community feedback.

Evidence.label: ATAS-Style Chart Evidence
Evidence.subtitle: Inside our sessions, we combine chart structure with depth-style execution evidence. You will see bubble-style pressure areas and cluster/diamond-style confirmation logic before execution.

bubble.title: Bubble Pressure + Reaction Zone
bubble.label: Bubble
bubble.description: Bubble-style pressure areas reveal where institutional orders are clustering. Watch how price reacts at these high-volume zones for confirmation before entry.

cluster.title: Cluster Flow + Diamond Logic
cluster.label: Cluster
cluster.description: Cluster and diamond-style confirmation logic shows the exact points where aggressive buying or selling meets passive orders, giving clear execution signals.

CTA.subtitle: Join our Discord community and start learning how to read institutional flow, build high-conviction trade plans, and execute with precision.

Footer.description: A Discord-based trading education community focused on depth data, order-flow context, and institutional positioning.
Footer.tagline: Precision Trading · Depth Data · Institutional Edge
